calendar.matters:
HEARING ON PETITIONERS FOR CHANGE OF NAME OF MINORS
Off Calendar Mar-01-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: The matter came on Calendar for Petitioners request for Change of name for minor children.

Dept.505; Judge: Lydia Villarreal; Clerk: N. Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:06 am and concluding at 9:13 am.

Plaintiff Linda Ahuatzin is present in pro per, placed under oath and testifies.

Petition for change of name filed May 12, 2023.

Order to show cause filed June 23m, 2023.

Notice of hearing filed February 7, 2024.

The Court addresses the petitioner.

The Petitioner provides testimony.

After reviewing the petition, hearing the testimony, and over the Objection filed on August 21, 2023, The Court grants Petitioner's request for change of name of the minor children.

Order for change of name signed and filed this day. (D505)
